title: Billing & Sales
short_description: Create GST-ready sales documents with connected inventory, accounting, GST and outstanding workflows.
purpose: The Billing & Sales module helps businesses create professional GST-compliant documents while keeping customer balances, stock, accounting and GST records connected.
benefits: Connects invoices with inventory and accounting

title: Invoice Design Studio
short_description: Professional invoice templates for A4, A5, 3 inch thermal and 4 inch thermal printing.
purpose: Daksh ERP provides a flexible invoice design ecosystem so every business can print documents that match its workflow and brand identity.
benefits: Supports retail and detailed GST billing
Keeps invoice numbering structured by financial year

title: Purchase Management
short_description: Record supplier invoices with stock, accounting, GST input and payable tracking.
purpose: The Purchase module helps businesses record supplier bills and automatically connect them with stock, supplier outstanding, GST input and accounting workflows.
benefits: Connects stock inward with supplier invoices

title: Inventory Control
short_description: Track items, HSN, stock movement, valuation and inventory reports through connected transactions.
purpose: Inventory Control helps businesses maintain item records, track stock movement and understand inventory status from sales, purchase and adjustment workflows.
benefits: Connects stock with real business transactions
Helps identify low stock and movement trends

title: Accounting Engine
short_description: Connected accounting with vouchers, ledgers, books and financial reports.
purpose: The Accounting Engine connects billing, purchases, payments and journals so business records can flow into ledgers and financial reports.

title: GST Compliance
short_description: GST calculation, HSN reporting, GST visibility and filing-ready workflows.
purpose: GST Compliance tools help businesses maintain structured tax records for sales, purchases, HSN summaries and GST review.

title: GSTR-2B Reconciliation
short_description: Import 2B Excel, compare purchase records and identify ITC review areas.
purpose: The GSTR-2B reconciliation foundation helps accountants compare GST portal data with purchase records and identify missing or risky ITC items.
status_note: Reconciliation foundation is available. Advanced reconciliation workflows may continue expanding.

title: Executive Dashboard
short_description: Business overview with KPIs, alerts, GST visibility, inventory signals and financial health.
purpose: The Executive Dashboard gives business owners and managers a quick view of sales, purchase, cashflow, recovery, stock, GST and overall health.
benefits: Supports faster review of daily operations

title: Backup & Data Protection
short_description: Offline-first data control with automatic backup and recovery-ready architecture.
purpose: Backup and data protection workflows help businesses keep local data safer and recovery-ready.
benefits: Reduces risk of accidental data loss
Keeps business records under user control
Builds trust in offline ERP usage

title: AI Business Simulator
short_description: Ask practical what-if questions in Hindi, English or Hinglish and understand business impact.
purpose: The AI Business Simulator is designed to help users understand possible business outcomes using ERP data and practical simulation questions.
benefits: Makes business data easier to understand
